summary: Removed the redundant trailing Focus pill from Continue rows so Focus-backed rows remain legible at larger Dynamic Type while preserving the existing Domain · Focus subtitle and accessibility status actions.
risks: The visual pass used simulator-local seeded Today data rather than a full fixture-driven UI test.
Swipe actions are discoverable through iOS row gestures and accessibility actions, but there is still no always-visible Done button in Continue.
recommended_next_reason: Stop for review after correcting the visual issue found during the Today simulator pass.
